disabled_optimizers.mealpy.bio_based.BCO.OriginalBCO: Disabled due to an upstream Mealpy bug: the implementation references undefined attributes such as self.dim/self.positions during evolve().
disabled_optimizers.mealpy.human_based.CHIO.OriginalCHIO: Disabled due to an upstream Mealpy instability: under baseline benchmark settings the implementation can exhaust its candidate pool and fail with an empty argmin sequence.
